name: Curried Potatoes and Peas
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen peas or peas & mushrooms or, peas and carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine peeled, diced potatoes, water and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes until tender. Drain and reserve liquid.
2. In a saucepan, sauté onion and curry powder in margarine until tender. Stir in flour. Blend the mixture.
3. Add evaporated milk, part of the cooking liquid, peas or pea mixture, and salt to taste. Cook and stir until thick.
4. Add potatoes. Cook until heated through.
5. Serve garnished with parsley.
